title: Dalat for Runners: Your Complete Trail Guide from Trạm CP12
excerpt: Dalat is trail running's best-kept secret in Southeast Asia — 1,500m altitude, cool air year-round, and 50km of singletrack within 30 minutes of CP12. Here's every route, graded.

imgLabel: Solo traveler at CP12 common area
title: How to Feel at Home at Trạm CP12
excerpt: There's a particular kind of freedom in traveling alone. Our dorm, morning walks, and weekly Trạm Nights are designed so connections happen naturally.

imgLabel: Hidden café alley in Đà Lạt
title: Dalat's Hidden Gems: Beyond the Tourist Trail
excerpt: Skip the brochures. Our team reveals hidden cafés, backstreet food stalls, and underground arts you won't find on TripAdvisor.
